ksa_text: Ability to ensure compliance with data protection, privacy, and AI transparency requirements throughout system design and deployment, including impact assessments.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Regulatory Compliance falls outside the primary competency scope of the VP Analytics. This ability KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Regulatory Compliance truly out-of-scope for the VP Analytics? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Regulatory Compliance as a core or recommended competency for the VP Analytics. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Regulatory Compliance falls outside the established competency profile for the VP Analytics. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Regulatory Compliance is outside the competency scope of the VP Analytics. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
